text: {"fixed_xml":"<ITEM>6. Bey Herrn Haag an der Augustinerga\\u221a\\u00fc sind zu verkauffen: <BIBL><AUTHOR>Prideaun</AUTHOR> <TITLE>A. und N. Testam, in einer Connex. mit der V\\u221a\\u2202lcker-Historie</TITLE>, <PLACE>Berlin</PLACE> <YEAR>1725</YEAR>. <VOLUME>4. 1I. Tom. 1. Vol. 2</VOLUME> \\u221a\\u2020 <AUTHOR>Cattenburg</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Sapientia Mos. de Vita & Scriptis Mosis contra Deistas</TITLE>. <PLACE>Amst.</PLACE> <YEAR>1737</YEAR>. <FORMAT>4.</FORMAT></BIBL> <BIBL><TITLE>Bibl.</TITLE> <VOLUME>8r. 70.</VOLUME> <AUTHOR>Interpp. Reineccii</AUTHOR>, <PLACE>Lips.</PLACE> <YEAR>1737</YEAR>. <FORMAT>8\\u221a\\u2264.</FORMAT></BIBL> <BIBL><TITLE>Bibl. Hebr. punctata</TITLE> von <AUTHOR>Leusdenii</AUTHOR>, <PLACE>Frf.</PLACE> <YEAR>1694</YEAR>. <FORMAT>12.</FORMAT></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Seldenus</AUTHOR> <TITLE>de Diis Syris</TITLE>. <PLACE>Lips.</PLACE> <YEAR>1692</YEAR>. <FORMAT>8.</FORMAT></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Gottschedens</AUTHOR> <TITLE>critische Dichtkunst</TITLE>, <PLACE>Leipzig</PLACE> <YEAR>1737</YEAR>. <FORMAT>8v\\u221a\\u2264.</FORMAT></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>B\\u221a\\u2202dickers</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Grunds\\u221a\\u00a7tze der Deutschen Sprach</TITLE>, <PLACE>Berlin</PLACE>, <YEAR>1729</YEAR>. <FORMAT>8v\\u221a\\u2264.</FORMAT></BIBL></ITEM>","number_of_corrections":6,"explanation":"1) Fixed the first BIBL entry: 'Prideaun' was mistakenly inside TITLE; it is the author, so it was moved to AUTHOR and the descriptive part kept in TITLE. 2) The PRIZE tag wrongly wrapped 'Cattenburg', which is actually the author of the next work (Sapientia Mos...). The erroneous PRIZE tag was removed and 'Cattenburg' tagged as AUTHOR. 3) Corrected the nesting error: the 'Sapientia Mos.' work was incorrectly opened inside the first BIBL without its own opening tag and an extra nested BIBL was opened for the next entry. The structure was restructured so each work has its own properly closed BIBL element. 4) Removed the stray/extra opening <BIBL> before 'Bibl.' that caused improper nesting, making 'Bibl. ... Reineccii' a standalone BIBL. 5) For the Bibl. Hebr. entry, moved 'punctata' (part of the title) out of the AUTHOR tag into TITLE, leaving only 'Leusdenii' as AUTHOR. 6) Ensured all BIBL elements are properly opened and closed and the overall ITEM structure is well-formed."}

The erroneous PRIZE tag was removed and 'Cattenburg' tagged as AUTHOR. 3) Corrected the nesting error: the 'Sapientia Mos.' work was incorrectly opened inside the first BIBL without its own opening tag and an extra nested BIBL was opened for the next entry. The structure was restructured so each work has its own properly closed BIBL element. 4) Removed the stray/extra opening <BIBL> before 'Bibl.' that caused improper nesting, making 'Bibl. ... Reineccii' a standalone BIBL. 5) For the Bibl. Hebr. entry, moved 'punctata' (part of the title) out of the AUTHOR tag into TITLE, leaving only 'Leusdenii' as AUTHOR. 6) Ensured all BIBL elements are properly opened and closed and the overall ITEM structure is well-formed.
